---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement
<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected?
Format: As a [user type], I want to [goal] so that [benefit]. -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- Describe the change or feature you'd like to see. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Have you considered other approaches? What are the trade-offs? -->

## Priority
<!-- Nice to have / Would significantly improve workflow / Blocking adoption -->

## Additional context
<!-- Mockups, links, examples from other projects, etc. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this has not been requested.
